docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF FRED NORTON IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION TO FILE UNDER SEAL (TRANSACTION ID # 100182723) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAUKLEROS LLC, A WYOMING LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY WYCOFF, JEFFREY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS NAUKLEROS LLC AND JEFFREY WYCOFF'S UNOPPOSED APPLICATION TO SEAL EXHIBITS 4, 5, 7, 8, 14, AND 15 TO COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Continued To May-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Application To Seal Exhibits 4, 5, 7, 8, 14, And 15 To Complaint, Memorandum Of Law In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS NAUKLEROS LLC and JEFFREY WYCOFF'S Application To Seal Exhibits 4, 5, 7, 8, 14, And 15 To Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed "application to seal exhibits 4, 5, 7, 8, 14 and 15 to complaint" is granted. The proposed order shall state the factors in CRC 2.550(d).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
